name: Chatwoot to sms.bd SMS + Private Note v6 Rechecked

parameters.content:
## Setup - No ENV needed

Open **Workflow Config - Edit Here** node and set:

- `smsbdApiKey`
- `chatwootBaseUrl` without trailing slash, example: `https://app.unichat.com.bd`
- `chatwootApiToken` = Chatwoot user API access token
- `smsFooterEnabled` true/false
- `smsFooterText` like company name/signature

Webhook URL for Chatwoot:
`https://YOUR_N8N_DOMAIN/webhook/chatwoot-to-smsbd`

Private note endpoint used by this workflow:
`POST /api/v1/accounts/{accountId}/conversations/{conversationId}/messages`

Payload used:
```json
{
  "content": "Message sent successfully.",
  "message_type": "outgoing",
  "private": true,
  "content_type": "text"
}
```

V6 fix:
- Private note HTTP node now sends the body as raw JSON/object, matching Chatwoot curl format.
- `accountId` comes from `payload.account.id`.
- `conversationId` comes from `payload.conversation.id`.
- SMS is sent only when `event === "message_created"`.
